title: White Enderman:Reimagined
description: It's taken from the creepypasta "WHITE ENDERMAN".
body:
![whiteendermangösteriş](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84a7fe3a5da877d156326ff9d246df9b5317ad6d_0.webp)
"Some things were never meant to be found in the game files..."

White Enderman (Entity 95) is not a typical mob you can just hunt and kill. He is a silent observer, a glitch in the reality of your Minecraft world. He doesn't scream, he doesn't run; he simply watches from the edge of your render distance.

The v1.0 Experience:

The Presence: Feel the unsettling atmosphere as Entity 95 stalks you. You might see him between the trees or standing outside your house at midnight.

Psychological Tension: Strange sounds, doors opening by themselves, and cryptic messages in the chat will make you question if you are truly alone.

The Stare: If you find him, he will freeze and lock eyes with you. A countdown begins. Will he vanish into the thin air, or is he waiting for the right moment to strike?

This version focuses on the Legend of Entity 95. Build your house, mine your diamonds, but remember: you are being watched.

Report your sightings... if you survive.
